description: 課程模組組裝（Content / Interaction / Review 三層設計與 contract 對齊）

tasks.desc: Define canonical three-layer model: Content module, Interaction module, Review module, and their responsibilities.
Map existing node taxonomy to three-layer model: learning_role/content_form/output_mode to modular responsibilities.
Introduce interaction_modes contract proposal for multi-answer-path nodes (MCQ/assembly/typing/speaking/transform).
Introduce review_policy contract proposal for Anki-style scheduling and card source definitions.
Introduce completion_rules contract proposal (required_modes, min_attempts, pass_policy) for guided output consistency.
Resolve contract mismatches between UNITFAC specs/templates/checker (repair_practice, followup semantics, command paths).
Authoring template integration: add content/interaction/review sections and examples in UNITFAC-005 templates.
Checker integration: warning-first rules for missing interaction_modes/review_policy/completion_rules metadata.
Pilot application on A1-U05: attach modular metadata and validate mockup behavior with existing renderer registry.
Freeze recommendation: define what enters UNITFAC-001 v0.1 contract vs what remains optional.

Add course content segmentation and inline anchor linking: sentence/chunk click targets should open dictionary or knowledge lab refs when canonical knowledge links exist (e.g. weekday -> topic.weekday, numbers -> topic.number, endings -> grammar refs).
